text:
Once upon a time in the magical realm of Enchanted Woods, there lived a cheerful little girl named Qwen. Qwen had the unique ability to bring joy wherever she went and her laughter was like music to everyone's ears. One sunny morning, Qwen decided to have a picnic with her best friend, a wise old owl named Oliver.

They flew over the shimmering lake and found a perfect spot under the ancient oak tree where the leaves rustled softly in the breeze. Qwen spread out a colorful blanket, and they enjoyed delicious treats and shared stories about their adventures.

As they finished their meal, a small rabbit hopped out from behind a bush, looking frightened. Qwen approached the rabbit gently and asked if it needed help. The rabbit nodded, saying its family was lost and couldn't find their way home through the dense forest.

Qwen immediately offered to guide the rabbit back home. With Oliver perched on her shoulder, they set off through the woods. Qwen sang
